name: the-talus-field-tools
description: Dev-only tooling for the build-free editorial site. Lives in scripts/ (NOT the repo root) so Cloudflare Pages keeps treating the root as a static, build-free deploy. The site never depends on this at runtime. Run: cd scripts && npm install && npm run images

scripts.check: bash check-cache-busters.sh && bash check-seo-artifacts.sh && node gen-prerender.mjs --check && node gen-compiled.mjs --check
